This is a British TV show, in four episodes, available on Netflix. It is the first TV show I have wanted to watch in about four years. I cannot review it without immediate [spoilers](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4ea5a4fe333166cee71877f6fae56cf82fa4f4401adb437224322638b9b387f0&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91405&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=698ef05a7519ae607ad6d761fc9a3753&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g/dj1QblJ6VjRlaFN4WQ=&email_id=d3d1476f1ebc8a7f5ecaa54a20e930f2), but I can tell you it takes place in a school, in a criminal justice system, and in a family. Northern England, so do turn on those subtitles. Here are [some reviews](http://marginalrevolution.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=b3e1a1f2493c2e48bbb0244236ee54b93a21a708709ec1d7b1e8ba4934d97262&blog_id=42693868&post_id=91405&user_id=262258391&subs_id=225460721&signature=30c53a840fbc1e1c1eb6f201fc54febd&email_name=new-post&user_email=ishan.mail@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=d3d1476f1ebc8a7f5ecaa54a20e930f2).
